base_prompt: Single centered 3D asset, floating mineral data garden island, dark graphite stone base, translucent glass root network, thin luminous cyan route veins, three to five small warm amber data blossoms, precise botanical technical specimen, dark museum object aesthetic, clean silhouette, no text, no logo, no characters, no mascot, export as GLB.
negative_prompt: No text, no typography, no logo, no brand mark, no UI labels, no dashboard UI, no characters, no mascot, no cute fantasy terrain, no cartoon flowers, no oversized leaves, no house, no path, no buildings, no landscape background, no flat poster, no image-only render.

spline_ai.prompt: A single centered 3D object: floating mineral data garden island with dark graphite base, translucent glass roots, thin cyan glowing route veins, and three warm amber data blossoms. Technical specimen, museum object, clean silhouette. No text, no logos, no characters.
spline_ai.use: Fast visual ideation. Keep only candidates with strong silhouette.

tripo.prompt: Single centered 3D asset, floating mineral evidence garden, asymmetrical oval graphite island, glass roots visible underneath, cyan luminous route veins across the surface, three small amber data blossoms, technical botanical specimen, no text, no logo, no characters, clean GLB-ready silhouette.
tripo.use: Generate downloadable GLB candidates for model smoke tests.

meshy.prompt: A GLB-ready 3D model of a floating evidence garden: dark mineral island, translucent root network, subtle cyan data veins, small amber data blossoms, precise technical-botanical style, centered object, no background scene, no text, no logo, no characters.
meshy.use: Generate and compare GLB/FBX/OBJ outputs; use remesh if silhouette is good.

image_to_3d_seed.prompt: Front three-quarter concept render of a centered floating mineral data garden, dark graphite base, glass roots, cyan route veins, amber data blossoms, dark neutral background, technical specimen style, high silhouette clarity, no text or logos.
image_to_3d_seed.use: If text-to-3D is weak, first generate a reference image and then use image-to-3D.

state_requirements.label: Dormant Island
state_requirements.visual_change: dim roots and faint route veins
state_requirements.web_runtime_layer: base GLB plus soft environment light

state_requirements.label: Root Scan
state_requirements.visual_change: cyan scan plane reveals glass roots
state_requirements.web_runtime_layer: animated scan ring or clipping plane

state_requirements.label: Data Bloom
state_requirements.visual_change: amber blossoms brighten and lift slightly
state_requirements.web_runtime_layer: emissive material pulse and small transform offsets

state_requirements.label: Archive Constellation
state_requirements.visual_change: small particles rise into sparse archive field
state_requirements.web_runtime_layer: procedural particles and subtle camera pullback
